creator: jacob@jacobatzen.dk
text:
Since the release of Ruby 1.8.6 various issues have been fixed in the 1.8.6 tree. Notably is a fix for a problem which makes the standard unit test tool for Ruby return 0 as error code no matter if tests pass or fail. If possible please update the port of Ruby 1.8.6 to the newest patch level.

Further information here on the mentioned bug here:

http://rubyforge.org/tracker/?func=detail&atid=1698&aid=9300&group_id=426
http://svn.ruby-lang.org/cgi-bin/viewvc.cgi?view=rev&revision=12309
http://svn.ruby-lang.org/cgi-bin/viewvc.cgi?view=rev&revision=12126
